headline: Markets surged on Strait of Hormuz reopening, with oil retreating as supply fears eased and risk ass…
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Apr 18, 2026 Markets surged on Strait of Hormuz reopening, with oil retreating as supply fears eased and risk assets rallying across the board. Bitcoin's breakout past $75K led a broad crypto surge, while equities extended gains on reduced geopolitical tail risk despite lingering Fed hawkishness. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $75,749 · ETH: $2,353 · SOL: $86.17 · GOLD: $4,854 · SPY: $710.14 (+1.5%) · QQQ: $648.85 (+1.8%) · VIX: $17.48 (-2.6%) · TLT: $87.07 (+0.3%) · DXY: $98.23 (+0.0%) · OIL: $82.59 (-12.8%) EVENING NEWS ▼ Iran closes Strait of Hormuz, fires on vessels, escalating US-Iran tensions ▲ Solana futures open interest rose by 20% this week: Is $100 SOL next? ▼ Bitcoin mining difficulty falls, but projected to rise in next adjustment ▲ Ethereum Hits All-Time High in Quarterly Network Activity ▲ RAVE Pump-and-Dump Allegations Spark $25,000 Bounty and Exchange Pressure ▲ Bitcoin STHs realize gains: Correction or short squeeze, what’s ahead?
